briefs.title: Development Charge Instalment Rules Grandfathered for Payments Made Before Jan 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC updated its rules for paying development charges (fees developers pay to local governments before building). Developers who chose the instalment payment option and made their first payment before Jan 1, 2026 will continue under the old payment rules — not the new ones.
briefs.action_required: If you paid a development charge instalment before Jan 1, 2026, confirm with your municipality that the old payment schedule still applies to you.

key_dates.label: BC Development Charge Instalment Regulation amendment takes effect
